item.title: Core wholesale prices rose 0.8% in January, much more than expected
item.description: The core producer price index increased a seasonally adjusted 0.8%, more than the 0.6% gain in December.

item.title: Trump insists trade deals safe after Supreme Court ruling upends tariff authority, but partners aren’t so sure
item.description: The Supreme Court decision to strike down Trump's tariffs has thrown fresh confusion over the raft of trade deals negotiated with global partners, sta...

item.title: China’s leverage rises before high-stakes summit as Supreme Court curbs Trump tariffs
item.description: Supreme Court's decision to invalidate Trump's tariffs has strengthened China's hand ahead of the leaders summit in April, at a time when Beijing seek...

item.title: Top earners are more afraid for their employment than lower income as AI threat increases
item.description: The prospect of being replaced by artificial intelligence is helping to scare higher-income workers.

item.title: Five key takeaways from the Supreme Court's landmark decision against Trump's tariffs
item.description: What's far less certain is the longer-reaching impacts as the economy and markets again adjust to a changing landscape.
